text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon and I are chatting in the hallway
when Rice Shower runs over to us.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Have you decided on a costume for the party,
Bourbon? Creek told me about your search...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The situation has not changed. I'm making an
effort to search in all manner of places, but I
cannot locate anything to base a costume on.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
O-oh, well... you've really given this a lot of
thought, haven't you?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Nevertheless, I cannot find anything... All I do is
race, so maybe I really am boring.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: That's not true at all! I mean, you're...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...Um, if you haven't decided yet, what about
going as a ghost?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: A ghost?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah. I bet you could put a costume together
really easily, and it won't matter what you look
like underneath.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to dress up as a vampire, so you could
be my ghost friend who lives with me in my
mansion!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I see... Even if I dress as a ghost, it'll still be "me"
underneath. Indeed, my facial expression would
be irrelevant.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Backstory saved to memory. I will go as a
"vampire's ghost friend."

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh! That's great! Okay, let's go shopping right
away!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Wow, this material's cute... But I think plain would
probably be better for a ghost.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I surmise that ghosts are typically white. However,
I am uncertain whether that also applies to
costumes.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that might work! Yeah, let's do that! Which
one do you like more, Bourbon? This flower or
this ribbon?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I don't believe either one would present an issue.
Why don't we use whichever aligns with my
vampire friend's preferences?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: O-oh, okay! So I should choose, then. Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um... Are you okay with all the bags? I feel bad
you're carrying mine too...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hm? Are you all right, Bourbon? Getting tired?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Negative. I am simply wondering whether my
comments and behavior while shopping were
appropriate.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Even though we were shopping for my benefit, I
could only offer robotic responses. As such—

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I had fun!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
You might not show your feelings on your face
very much...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But you do know how to put them into words
when asked, and you're always honest about
them.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
And because you do all that, I don't feel anxious
and end up overthinking things.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Even though I was the one who asked you to dress
up as a ghost, you still gave the costume a lot of
thought.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
That made me so happy... Even now, I'm still over
the moon.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
So, nope, you're not boring at all. I have so much
fun when I'm with you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't matter one bit if your expression
doesn't change. I love you just the way you are.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Is that... so?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I feel... the same. Also... I cannot wait to be your
ghost friend.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ah... Y-yeah. Let's make some great costumes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I catch sight of a ghost and a
vampire holding hands and laughing. The white
sheet seems to be swaying happily.
